description: As an Industrial Production Manager, update the maintenance system by registering a new machine named 'CNC Vertical Milling Machine - Haas VF-2SS' under a new category 'CNC Machinery' for the Manufacturing department with a 90-day Preventive Maintenance schedule assigned to a maintenance team. Additionally, create an Urgent (3 stars) Corrective Maintenance Request for the 'Hydraulic Press - Schuler 2500T' with the subject 'Hydraulic pressure loss - immediate inspection required' and description 'Hydraulic fluid leak detected at main cylinder seal. Production halted on line 3 pending repair.' Login: admin@example.com / admin.
